creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I think it might be important to archive the old freebsd/freebsd-quarterly repository before the end of the month, as in March we are going to start the next collection of status reports: I would like to avoid receiving pull requests on the old repository by accident.

The other requests can wait a bit longer, but could we have the repository archived within the next few days please? Thanks.
